title: minuartia elmalia
intro: Minuartia elmalia, also known as Elmalı minuartia or Turkish minuartia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a low-growing, herbaceous plant with small white flowers and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Minuartia elmalia include its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which may contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Minuartia elmalia is traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and is often prepared as a decoction or infusion.
